calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Aug-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
DAVID J. COOK, ESQ. COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS A PROFESSIONAL LAW CORPORATION (415) 989-4730
Cook@SqueezeBloodFromTurnip.com Attorneys for Plaintiff ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.,
No other appearances.

No argument is held. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for assignment of rights, restraining order and turnover order" is granted.

Order and judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Samuel K. Feng; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings Not Reported.

Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc. is represented by David Cook, Esq.
Defendant Jessica Saepoff not appearing.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., and against Defendant Jessica Saepoff, as follows:

1. Damages: $53,876.07
2. Prejudgment Interest: $6,804.36
3. Costs: $585.00
4. Attorney fees: $1,000.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $62,265.43

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)
